title: A KdV conservative update preserves discrete mass under periodic flux

source.notes: Discrete-mass preservation theorem for the configurable KdV-like conservative flux.

informal.statement: If the configurable KdV-like conservative flux is periodic over the finite range, then the KdV conservative update preserves discrete mass.
assumptions: scale, nonlinear, and dispersion are real numbers
u is a real-valued grid state
n is the number of cells in the finite range
the KdV conservative flux satisfies periodicBoundary
informal.expected_conclusion: Discrete mass is invariant under the periodic-flux KdV conservative update.

declarations.name: discreteMass_kdvConservativeUpdate_of_periodicFlux
declarations.statement: theorem discreteMass_kdvConservativeUpdate_of_periodicFlux (scale nonlinear dispersion : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) (hflux : periodicBoundary (kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion u) n) : discreteMass (fun i => kdvConservativeUpdate scale nonlinear dispersion u i) n = discreteMass u n

tasks.input: Translate periodic-flux discrete-mass preservation for the configurable KdV conservative update into Lean 4.
tasks.target: theorem discreteMass_kdvConservativeUpdate_of_periodicFlux (scale nonlinear dispersion : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) (hflux : periodicBoundary (kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion u) n) : discreteMass (fun i => kdvConservativeUpdate scale nonlinear dispersion u i) n = discreteMass u n

tasks.input: Given discreteMass and totalOn_kdvConservativeUpdate_of_periodicFlux, complete the proof.
tasks.target: A proof by unfolding discreteMass and applying totalOn_kdvConservativeUpdate_of_periodicFlux.
